chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Crl. Acctt. Appeal No.05 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ Disposed of Matter: For order as to maintainability of MA No.1363/2026. ----------- Dated; 3rd February 2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Langha, Advocate for Appellant. Syed Khurram Kamal, Special Prosecutor for NAB. -*-*-*-*-*- Through listed application the learned counsel for appellant has requested for recalling of judgment dated 18.12.2025 passed by this Court to the extent of appellant in instant appeal. We have noted that through same consolidated judgment Crl. Accountability Appeals No.5, 6 and 8 of 2017 were dismissed with modification in the sentence on the requests of appellant in instant appeal and the counsel for appellants in other connected appeals. Although the counsel for appellant in the instant appeal on the date of hearing was called absent and the appellant Ghulam Hussain Samo after hearing the appeals has prayed for reduction in the sentence, therefore, his appeal was dismissed by reducing his sentence to the extent of fine amount of Rs.926,400/-. It is a settled proposition of law in the Criminal Jurisprudence that once the judgment has been passed by the criminal Court or criminal Appellate Court, it cannot be reviewed its own judgment. Learned counsel for the appellant has failed to point out any illegality or irregularity in the said judgment, therefore, listed application (M.A. No.1363/2026) is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
